trans-unit.resname: Do not attempt to open this HDI in Design mode using this version; if you do so, forms and/or methods could be altered because of missing functionality.
trans-unit.source: Do not attempt to open this HDI in Design mode using this version; if you do so, forms and/or methods could be altered because of missing functionality.
trans-unit.target: Do not attempt to open this HDI in Design mode using this version; if you do so, forms and/or methods could be altered because of missing functionality.

trans-unit.source: Sorry, this "How do I..." (HDI) example must be used with a newer version of 4D (v16 and above).
trans-unit.target: Sorry, this "How do I..." (HDI) example must be used with a newer version of 4D (v16 and above).

trans-unit.resname: ... use DISTINCT VALUE with count (new parameter)?
trans-unit.source: ... use DISTINCT VALUE with count (new parameter)?
trans-unit.target: ... use DISTINCT VALUE with count (new parameter)?

trans-unit.resname: ... use the new event "On Mouse Up"?
